# govulncheck allowlist
#
# Advisory IDs listed here are EXCLUDED from failing the govulncheck CI job.
# Everything else that govulncheck reports as "called" by our code still fails
# the build. Keep this list as small as possible and document the reason for
# every entry, including a link to the advisory.
#
# Format: one advisory ID per line. Inline "# comment" after the ID is ignored.

# GO-2024-3042 (CVE-2024-3056): Podman memory-based denial of service.
# Affects ALL versions of github.com/containers/podman/v5 with NO fixed
# version available, and lists no specific affected symbols, so govulncheck
# flags any use of the module. We only import the pkg/bindings HTTP client and
# never run the affected daemon code path. Revisit if upstream ships a fix.
# https://pkg.go.dev/vuln/GO-2024-3042
GO-2024-3042

# GO-2025-3961 (CVE-2025-4953): Podman creates a temporary file with insecure
# permissions. Same situation as above: all versions affected, no fix
# available, no specific affected symbols, and the affected code is not in the
# pkg/bindings client we use. Revisit if upstream ships a fix.
# https://pkg.go.dev/vuln/GO-2025-3961
GO-2025-3961
